---
title: "Left Heart Catheterization data"
author: "SUPPORT trial"
date: "5/20/2026"
date-modified: "5/23/2026"
categories: [Causal I, SUPPORT Study]
---

## Source 

ICU data from SUPPORT trial.  
As modified by TPH

## Dataset

[rhc_class_tph.dta](../../data/rhc_class_tph.dta)

or use directly in code

```stata
use https://tphofer.github.io/ncsp-hhcr/data/rhc_class_tph.dta
```

## Dataset description

### Features

mortality, hospitalized patients, extensive sociodemographic and comorbidity data

### Variables


```
. codebook,compact

Variable    Obs Unique      Mean       Min       Max  Label
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
id         5735   5735      2868         1      5735  
ptid       5735   5735         .         .         .  Patient ID
age        5735   5036  61.37591    18.042   101.848  Age
agecat     5735      5  2.809416         1         5  Age (5 categories)
sex        5735      2  1.556582         1         2  
edu        5735     42  11.67846         0        30  Years of Education
male       5735      2  .5565824         0         1  
race       5735      3   1.34612         1         4  Race (3 categories)
income     5735      4   1.75048         1         4  Income (4 categories)
ninsclas   5735      6  3.331125         1         6  Insurance type (6 category)
sadmdte    5735   1401  11638.69     10754     12441  study admission date
lstctdte   5735    932  11781.26     10756     12644  date of last contact
dschdte    5734   1486  11660.05     10757     12560  hospital discharge date
dthdte     3722   1592  11753.87     10757     12783  date of death
t3d30      5735     29  23.61221         2        30  min{dthdte - sadmdte, 30}
dth30      5735      2  .3344377         0         1  Outcome:Death within 30d
dth60      5735      2  .4034874         0         1  Death within 60d
death      5735      2  .6489974         0         1  death in followup (anytime)
swang1     5735      2  .3808195         0         1  Treatement:RHC at <= 24 hours
cat1       5735      9  3.905493         1         9  Primary disease category
cat2       5735      7  9.648649         4        10  Secondary disease category
resp       5735      2  .3684394         0         1  Admit dx resp (up to 4 total)
seps       5735      2  .1797733         0         1  Admit dx sepsis (up to 4 total)
card       5735      2  .3367044         0         1  Admit dx card (up to 4 total)
meta       5735      2  .0462075         0         1  Admit dx metabolic (up to 4 total)
renal      5735      2  .0514385         0         1  Admit dx renal (up to 4 total)
gastr      5735      2  .1642546         0         1  Admit dx gastr (up to 4 total)
hema       5735      2  .0617262         0         1  Admit dx hema (up to 4 total)
neuro      5735      2   .120837         0         1  Admit dx neuro (up to 4 total)
ortho      5735      2  .0012206         0         1  Admit dx ortho (up to 4 total)
trauma     5735      2  .0090671         0         1  Admit dx trauma (up to 4 total)
dnr1       5735      2  .1140366         0         1  DNR status day 1
das2d3pc   5735   1023  20.49689        11        33  DASI ( Duke Activity Status Index)
adld3pc    5735   1139  1.571261         0         7  ADLs lost @  2 wks prior
surv2md1   5735   1522  .5924501         0  .9619999  2M model survival prediction at day 1
scoma1     5735     11  21.00418         0       100  SUPPORT Coma Score based on Glasgow D1
transhx    5735      2  .1154316         0         1  Transfer (> 24 Hours) from Another Hospital
ca         5735      3    1.3034         1         3  Cancer (3 catgory)
resp1      5735     72  28.09212         0       100  respiration rate Day 1
meanbp1    5735    178  78.52005         0       259  Mean Blood Pressure Day 1
hrt1       5735    189  115.1789         0       250  heart rate Day 1
temp1      5735    118  37.61836        27        43  temperature (celcius) Day 1
wtkilo1    5735    922  67.82782         0       244  weight in kilograms
urin1      2707   1440  2192.454         0      9000  Urine Output Day 1
pafi1      5735   1342  222.2737  11.59961     937.5  PaO2/(.01*FiO2) Day 1
aps1       5735    123  54.66765         3       147  Apache III score (w.o. Coma) Day 1
wblc1      5735    520  15.64516         0       192  white blood cell count Day 1
hema1      5735    450  31.86548         2   66.1875  hematocrit Day 1
sod1       5735     73   136.769       101       178  serum sodium Day 1
pot1       5735     81  4.066693  1.099854  11.89844  serum potassium Day 1
crea1      5735    148  2.133017  .0999908  25.09766  serum creatinine Day 1
alb1       5735     57  3.092743  .2999878        29  albumin Day 1
bili1      5735    266  2.267067  .0999908  58.19531  bilirubin Day 1
ph1        5735     96  7.388413  6.579102  7.769531  serum ph (arterial) Day 1
paco21     5735    266  38.74897         1       156  paco2 Day 1
cardiohx   5735      2  .1766347         0         1  cardio comorbidity
chfhx      5735      2  .1780296         0         1  chf comorbidity
amihx      5735      2  .0348736         0         1  ami comorbidity
chrpulhx   5735      2  .1898867         0         1  chrpul comorbidity
renalhx    5735      2  .0444638         0         1  renal comorbidity
liverhx    5735      2  .0699215         0         1  liver comorbidity
gibledhx   5735      2  .0322581         0         1  gibled comorbidity
dementhx   5735      2  .0983435         0         1  dement comorbidity
psychhx    5735      2   .067306         0         1  psych comorbidity
malighx    5735      2  .2294682         0         1  malig comorbidity
immunhx    5735      2  .2690497         0         1  immun comorbidity
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```
